rationale: The rev-10 plan is implementation-ready and internally consistent with the registered meaning (measure only), the pre-review constraints, and the repository trust model. Trust root is honest and conditional on the external authority root with no overclaim; boundary is fail-closed and oracle-enforced (sole allowlisted non-node import merkle-dag/vendor.mjs, clotho/ never imported, empty dependencies); measurement semantics are pinned with discriminating positive/negative oracles (direction, transitivity, cycle-to-self exclusion, normalization, threshold inclusivity, digest-method split, full per-branch ingestion and attestation negatives, vocabulary acceptance); riskClass remains advisory (coverage-floored judgment, never a gate); completeness is attestation-gated with stable authz-N/AM-N anchors that must resolve in CURRENT-AUTHORITY and carries explicit non-claims; schemas are closed, ingestion fail-closed, operational data correctly segregated from memory/, and the acceptance sequence is documentation-first with a non-circular authority triple. No plan contradiction remains that would block AS-IS implementation. Out-of-scope enrollment-flip/verify-contracts items are correctly held. I stake the seat on this plan as written.
